claims.summary: The 0.85 entropy gate should be C1-smooth and free of a perceptible activation pop.
claims.disposition: verify exact 0.84, 0.85, and 0.86 smoothstep and no-pop regressions

claims.summary: Rapid entropy oscillation and high-entropy noise can make tail vibrancy muddy.
claims.disposition: verify oscillation EMA, structural-substance checks, and bounded noise-dampening evidence

claims.summary: The tail ceiling or vibrancy offset should expand dynamically with pressure risk.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live codec gain and control coupling
